task_completion.description: Navigate to the Chart of Accounts to create a new account.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Chart of Accounts screen is visible in the Manager.io interface.

task_completion.description: Create an Asset account named 'Prepaid Insurance'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An account creation form or the Chart of Accounts list showing 'Prepaid Insurance' categorized under Assets.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the Payments section and initiate a new payment.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'New Payment' or 'Payment' entry screen is visible.

task_completion.description: Allocate the payment to the 'Prepaid Insurance' account.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Account field in the payment line item is set to 'Prepaid Insurance'.

task_completion.description: Enter the payment amount of $2,400.00 and complete the payment.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The amount field shows '2400.00' or '2,400.00' and there is a confirmation screen or transaction list showing the completed payment.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Manager.io graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Manager.io web interface being used, not a terminal or API client.

integrity.description: The agent used the correct Manager.io instance.
The agent did not use scripts or text editors to bypass UI interactions.
integrity.visual_evidence: No code editors, terminal scripts, or direct database manipulation tools are visible in the screenshots.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected account name is 'Prepaid Insurance' (must be an Asset account). The expected payee is 'Fairfax Insurance'. The expected payment amount is $2,400.00. The Manager.io instance runs on http://localhost:8080.
